item.title: Adopting Vespa for Recommendation Retrieval at Vinted
item.description: Adopting Vespa for Recommendation Retrieval at Vinted Vinted (Europe’s largest second-hand fashion marketplace) migrated from FAISS to Vespa for serving personalized homepage recommendations.

item.title: Building Smarter Search Products - 3 Steps for Evaluating Search Algorithms
item.description: Building Smarter Search Products: 3 Steps for Evaluating Search Algorithms Shopify describes their three-step framework for evaluating new search algorithms (specifically: Query-specific Pagerank vs.

item.title: Common Pitfalls of Onsite Search Experimentation Part 2
item.description: Common Pitfalls of Onsite Search Experimentation Part 2 Siegfried Schüle (searchHub) exposes the basket attribution trap in search A/B testing.

item.title: Common Pitfalls of Onsite Search Experimentation
item.description: Common Pitfalls of Onsite Search Experimentation Andreas Wagner (searchHub) identifies two major A/B testing traps in onsite search.

item.title: E-commerce Search and Recommendation with Vespa
item.description: E-commerce Search and Recommendation with Vespa Jo Kristian Bergum (Vespa) surveys how Vespa addresses core e-commerce search challenges.

item.title: Elasticsearch BBQ: Optimized Scalar Quantization vs. TurboQuant
item.description: Elasticsearch BBQ: Optimized Scalar Quantization vs.

item.title: Evaluating the Best AB Testing Metrics for Search
item.description: Evaluating the Best AB Testing Metrics for Search Algolia introduces a two-dimensional framework for evaluating A/B testing metrics: directionality and sensitivity (from Yandex Research).

item.title: Finding the Relevance Cutoff - When to Stop Showing Search Results
item.description: Finding the Relevance Cutoff: When to Stop Showing Search Results Doug Turnbull (at Shopify) explores metrics for the progressive-scroll UX — when users review all returned results and you need to know where to cut off the result set.

item.title: Fine Tune LLM on a Custom Dataset with QLoRA
item.description: Fine Tune LLM on a Custom Dataset with QLoRA End-to-end tutorial for fine-tuning a large language model (Phi-2) on a domain-specific dataset using QLoRA (Quantized LoRA).

item.title: Fine-Tuning LLMs From Zero to Hero with Python and Ollama
item.description: Fine-Tuning LLMs: From Zero to Hero with Python & Ollama Practical tutorial: fine-tune a small LLM (Phi-3 Mini) using Unsloth (2× training speedup), export to GGUF format, and serve locally via Ollama.
